revision.text:
'''甲戌'''（きのえいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて11番目で、前は[[癸酉]]、次は[[乙亥]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は木、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲戌の年==
==甲戌の日== ===[[選日]]=== 甲戌の日は[[犯土|大土]]の5日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''甲戌'''（きのえいぬ、こうぼくのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの11番目で、前は[[癸酉]]、次は[[乙亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って14が余る年が甲戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[14年]] *[[74年]] *[[134年]] *[[194年]] *[[254年]] *[[314年]] *[[374年]] *[[434年]] *[[494年]] *[[554年]] *[[614年]] *[[674年]] *[[734年]] *[[794年]] *[[854年]] *[[914年]] *[[974年]] | *[[1034年]] *[[1094年]] *[[1154年]] *[[1214年]] *[[1274年]] *[[1334年]] *[[1394年]] *[[1454年]] *[[1514年]] *[[1574年]] *[[1634年]] *[[1694年]] *[[1754年]] *[[1814年]] *[[1874年]] *[[1934年]] *[[1994年]] | *[[2054年]] *[[2114年]] *[[2174年]] *[[2234年]] *[[2294年]] *[[2354年]] *[[2414年]] *[[2474年]] *[[2534年]] *[[2594年]] *[[2654年]] *[[2714年]] *[[2774年]] *[[2834年]] *[[2894年]] *[[2954年]] |}
==甲戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[9月]]が甲戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲戌の日== 甲戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 甲戌の日は[[犯土|大土]]の5日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:甲戌]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:甲戌]]

{{干支}} '''甲戌'''（きのえいぬ、こうぼくのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの11番目で、前は[[癸酉]]、次は[[乙亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌'''（きのえいぬ、こうぼくのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの11番目で、前は[[癸酉]]、次は[[乙亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って14が余る年が甲戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[14年]] *[[74年]] *[[134年]] *[[194年]] *[[254年]] *[[314年]] *[[374年]] *[[434年]] *[[494年]] *[[554年]] *[[614年]] *[[674年]] *[[734年]] *[[794年]] *[[854年]] *[[914年]] *[[974年]] | *[[1034年]] *[[1094年]] *[[1154年]] *[[1214年]] *[[1274年]] *[[1334年]] *[[1394年]] *[[1454年]] *[[1514年]] *[[1574年]] *[[1634年]] *[[1694年]] *[[1754年]] *[[1814年]] *[[1874年]] *[[1934年]] *[[1994年]] | *[[2054年]] *[[2114年]] *[[2174年]] *[[2234年]] *[[2294年]] *[[2354年]] *[[2414年]] *[[2474年]] *[[2534年]] *[[2594年]] *[[2654年]] *[[2714年]] *[[2774年]] *[[2834年]] *[[2894年]] *[[2954年]] |}
==甲戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[9月]]が甲戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲戌の日== 甲戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 甲戌の日は[[犯土|大土]]の5日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dog-qq]] [[Category:甲戌]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲戌]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dog-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Dog}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲戌]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Wood Dog]]

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの11番目で、前は[[癸酉]]、次は[[乙亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って14が余る年が甲戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[14年]] *[[74年]] *[[134年]] *[[194年]] *[[254年]] *[[314年]] *[[374年]] *[[434年]] *[[494年]] *[[554年]] *[[614年]] *[[674年]] *[[734年]] *[[794年]] *[[854年]] *[[914年]] *[[974年]] | *[[1034年]] *[[1094年]] *[[1154年]] *[[1214年]] *[[1274年]] *[[1334年]] *[[1394年]] *[[1454年]] *[[1514年]] *[[1574年]] *[[1634年]] *[[1694年]] *[[1754年]] *[[1814年]] *[[1874年]] *[[1934年]] *[[1994年]] | *[[2054年]] *[[2114年]] *[[2174年]] *[[2234年]] *[[2294年]] *[[2354年]] *[[2414年]] *[[2474年]] *[[2534年]] *[[2594年]] *[[2654年]] *[[2714年]] *[[2774年]] *[[2834年]] *[[2894年]] *[[2954年]] |}
==甲戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[9月]]が甲戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲戌の日== 甲戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 甲戌の日は[[犯土|大土]]の5日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dog-qq]] [[Category:甲戌]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲戌]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dog-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲戌]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Wood Dog]] [[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dog|kanji=甲戌|romaji=kinoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=jiǎxū|w=chia-hsü|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ɕy⁵³|y=gaap6 seot1|j=gaap6 seot1|ci=kaːp̚ sœt̚|mc=kæp syt|oc-bs=kaːp ʔsuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Dog also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 甲戌'''（きのえいぬ、こうぼくのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの11番目で、前は[[癸酉]]、次は[[乙亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。

==甲戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[9月]]が甲戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲戌の日== 甲戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 甲戌の日は[[犯土|大土]]の5日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dog-qq]] [[Category:甲戌]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:甲戌]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Dog-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲戌]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Wood Dog]] [[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dog|kanji=甲戌|romaji=kinoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=jiǎxū|w=chia-hsü|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ɕy⁵³|y=gaap6 seot1|j=gaap6 seot1|ci=kaːp̚ sœt̚|mc=kæp syt|oc-bs=kaːp ʔsuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Dog also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 甲戌'''（きのえいぬ、こうぼくのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの11番目で、前は[[癸酉]]、次は[[乙亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って14が余る年が甲戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[14年]] *[[74年]] *[[134年]] *[[194年]] *[[254年]] *[[314年]] *[[374年]] *[[434年]] *[[494年]] *[[554年]] *[[614年]] *[[674年]] *[[734年]] *[[794年]] *[[854年]] *[[914年]] *[[974年]] | *[[1034年]] *[[1094年]] *[[1154年]] *[[1214年]] *[[1274年]] *[[1334年]] *[[1394年]] *[[1454年]] *[[1514年]] *[[1574年]] *[[1634年]] *[[1694年]] *[[1754年]] *[[1814年]] *[[1874年]] *[[1934年]] *[[1994年]] | *[[2054年]] *[[2114年]] *[[2174年]] *[[2234年]] *[[2294年]] *[[2354年]] *[[2414年]] *[[2474年]] *[[2534年]] *[[2594年]] *[[2654年]] *[[2714年]] *[[2774年]] *[[2834年]] *[[2894年]] *[[2954年]] |}
==甲戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[9月]]が甲戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲戌の日== 甲戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 甲戌の日は[[犯土|大土]]の5日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dog|kanji=甲戌|romaji=kinoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=jiǎxū|w=chia-hsü|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ɕy⁵³|y=gaap6 seot1|j=gaap6 seot1|ci=kaːp̚ sœt̚|mc=kæp syt|oc-bs=kaːp ʔsuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Dog also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 甲戌'''（きのえいぬ、こうぼくのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの11番目で、前は[[癸酉]]、次は[[乙亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==甲戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って14が余る年が甲戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[14年]] *[[74年]] *[[134年]] *[[194年]] *[[254年]] *[[314年]] *[[374年]] *[[434年]] *[[494年]] *[[554年]] *[[614年]] *[[674年]] *[[734年]] *[[794年]] *[[854年]] *[[914年]] *[[974年]] | *[[1034年]] *[[1094年]] *[[1154年]] *[[1214年]] *[[1274年]] *[[1334年]] *[[1394年]] *[[1454年]] *[[1514年]] *[[1574年]] *[[1634年]] *[[1694年]] *[[1754年]] *[[1814年]] *[[1874年]] *[[1934年]] *[[1994年]] | *[[2054年]] *[[2114年]] *[[2174年]] *[[2234年]] *[[2294年]] *[[2354年]] *[[2414年]] *[[2474年]] *[[2534年]] *[[2594年]] *[[2654年]] *[[2714年]] *[[2774年]] *[[2834年]] *[[2894年]] *[[2954年]] |}
==甲戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[9月]]が甲戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲戌の日== 甲戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 甲戌の日は[[犯土|大土]]の5日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[de:Holz-Hund]] [[af:Houthond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-cṳ̄de]][[de:Holz-Hundeen]][[en:Wood Dog]][[fr:Chien de boisboishak]][[it:Kap-chṳ́id]][[sn:iazija]][[ko:갑술]][[nds:Holt-Hundvi]][[vi:Giáp Tuất]][[za:Kanceij]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-chik]][[zh-yue:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dog|kanji=甲戌|romaji=kinoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=jiǎxū|w=chia-hsü|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ɕy⁵³|y=gaap6 seot1|j=gaap6 seot1|ci=kaːp̚ sœt̚|mc=kæp syt|oc-bs=kaːp ʔsuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Dog also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 甲戌'''（きのえいぬ、こうぼくのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの11番目で、前は[[癸酉]]、次は[[乙亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。[[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]]
==甲戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って14が余る年が甲戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[14年]] *[[74年]] *[[134年]] *[[194年]] *[[254年]] *[[314年]] *[[374年]] *[[434年]] *[[494年]] *[[554年]] *[[614年]] *[[674年]] *[[734年]] *[[794年]] *[[854年]] *[[914年]] *[[974年]] | *[[1034年]] *[[1094年]] *[[1154年]] *[[1214年]] *[[1274年]] *[[1334年]] *[[1394年]] *[[1454年]] *[[1514年]] *[[1574年]] *[[1634年]] *[[1694年]] *[[1754年]] *[[1814年]] *[[1874年]] *[[1934年]] *[[1994年]] | *[[2054年]] *[[2114年]] *[[2174年]] *[[2234年]] *[[2294年]] *[[2354年]] *[[2414年]] *[[2474年]] *[[2534年]] *[[2594年]] *[[2654年]] *[[2714年]] *[[2774年]] *[[2834年]] *[[2894年]] *[[2954年]] |}
==甲戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[9月]]が甲戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲戌の日== 甲戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 甲戌の日は[[犯土|大土]]の5日目である。

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements '''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements '''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

[[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houthond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sáe̤k]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[hak:Kap-sut]][[ja:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[nds:Holt-Hund]][[vi:Giáp Tuất]][[za:Gyapswt]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sut]][[zh-yue:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062917]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Dog [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dog|kanji=甲戌|romaji=kinoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=jiǎxū|w=chia-hsü|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ɕy⁵³|y=gaap6 seot1|j=gaap6 seot1|ci=kaːp̚ sœt̚|mc=kæp syt|oc-bs=kaːp ʔsuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Wood overcomes Earth). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dog (甲戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-inu ***Onyomi 1: kokuju ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sul (갑술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Tuất

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Wood overcomes Earth). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dog (甲戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-inu ***Onyomi 1: kokuju ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sul (갑술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Tuất

--> ==Years of Yang Wood Dog== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 14 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of 甲戌. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Wood Dog (甲戌)'s years table''' |- ! AD|ja|2954年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2954|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2954 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yang Wood Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements '''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly '''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Wood overcomes Earth). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Dog (甲戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎxū ** Cantonese '''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements '''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly '''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Wood Dog== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
